---
title: "Early Stopping GD"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
execute:
  echo: false
warning: false
message: false
error: false
---

Work on anytime valid inference has illustrated the dangers of stopping early
on biasing your inferential results. This work has focused on hypothesis testing
and braoder statistical inference and has not pushed into machine learning and 
prediction.

Machine learning has many algorithms that will stop early. Should we trust these
results or are they succeptible to the same issues that anytime-valid inference
aims to fix. 

Early stopping in SGD with patience and
